name: addCategory_OpenShift_Thanos
description: Detects OpenShift components via Thanos Querier and sets system.categories for suite-level appliesTo gating.
technology: Requires openshift.thanos.host and openshift.thanos.pass properties. Runs one probe PromQL query per suite (OCP, etcd, KubeVirt, ODF, ACM) and appends detected categories.
